name: Pumpkin Sheet Cake
recipeInstructions:
3 ounces cream cheese, softened
6 tablespoons butter
1 tablespoon milk
1 teaspoon vanilla
1 3/4 cups powdered sugar
1. In a large bowl, combine eggs, cooking oil, and sugar. Beat on medium speed until well blended.
2. Add pumpkin to the mixture and mix thoroughly.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, and nutmeg.
4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the pumpkin mixture, mixing until smooth. Scrape down sides of the bowl frequently.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured jelly roll pan, 10 by 15 inches. For a thinner cake, use an 11 by 17-inch pan. For a thicker cake, divide batter between two 9 by 9-inch pans.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F on the center shelf for 20 minutes or longer, depending on the size of the pan, until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool completely before spreading with cream cheese frosting.
